title: Subrahmanya Temple, Perambur
tagline: Subrahmanya Temple, Perambur — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: The Subrahmanya Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Murugan located in the town of Perambur, 14 kilometres from Mayiladuthurai.
overview.description: The Subrahmanya Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Murugan located in the town of Perambur, 14 kilometres from Mayiladuthurai. The principal idol of Murugan has six faces. There are plenty of snakes that occupy the precincts of the temple.

topPlaces.name: Kilianur, Karaikal
topPlaces.description: Kilianur is a revenue village in the Thirunallar taluk of Karaikal District. It is situated to the north-west of Karaikal town.

topPlaces.name: Annadanapuram
topPlaces.description: Annadanapuram is a village in the Nannilam taluk of Tiruvarur district in Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Sirupuliyur
topPlaces.description: Sirupuliyur is a village in the Nannilam taluk of Thiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The place is famous for the Sthalasayana Perumal Temple, a Hindu Temple dedicated to Lord Vishnu.

topPlaces.name: Sthalasayana Perumal Temple, Tirusirupuliyur
topPlaces.description: Sthalasayana Perumal Temple (also called Arulmaakadal Perumal Temple) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the god Vishnu located near Kollumangudi, Tamil Nadu, India. It is located 2 km away from Kollumangudi, 17 km away from Mayiladuthurai and 10 km from Karaikal.

topPlaces.name: Avazhikkarai (village)
topPlaces.description: Avazhikkarai is a village in the Tharangambadi Taluk and Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Elanthangudi
topPlaces.description: Elanthangudi is a village in the Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India. It is located 5 kilometres (3.1 mi) south of the town of Mayiladuthurai in the direction of Thiruvarur and roughly 300 kilometres (190 mi) from the state capital Chennai.

topPlaces.name: Veerateeswarar Temple, Vazhuvur
topPlaces.description: Veerateeswarar Temple (also called Vazhuvur Veerateeswarar temple) is a Hindu temple located at Vazhuvur in Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva in the form of Veerateswarar and his consort is known as Bala Gujambigai.

topPlaces.name: Agarakkirangudi
topPlaces.description: Agarakkirangudi is a village in the Mayiladuthurai taluk of Mayiladuthurai district, Tamil Nadu, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Subrahmanya Temple, Perambur?
faq.a: The best time to visit Subrahmanya Temple, Perambur is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Subrahmanya Temple, Perambur?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (111 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (112 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Subrahmanya Temple, Perambur?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Subrahmanya Temple, Perambur at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Subrahmanya Temple, Perambur?
faq.a: Stays in Subrahmanya Temple, Perambur start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Subrahmanya Temple, Perambur?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kilianur, Karaikal, Annadanapuram, Sirupuliyur, Sthalasayana Perumal Temple, Tirusirupuliyur, Avazhikkarai (village).
